subcodes.first_line: O assured leaf! Thy letter was received, and its contents were understood and comprehended. I beseech God that the handmaidens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه مکتوب شما رسید مضمون مفهوم و معلوم گردید از خدا میطلبم اماء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
